findings.detail: Unused imports: mean, stdev from statistics. Unused constant: _BASIS_2SIGMA_MULTIPLIER. Minor cleanup item.

notes: Imports only from gateway/cross_border (gateway module) and standard library. Zero pipeline sibling imports. Single public entry point: analyze_cross_border_flows(hypothesis_text, affected_countries) -> CrossBorderFlowReport. Clean DAG — all data fetching delegated to gateway layer.
